content: TASK-061 released ArchMap v0.2.1 from commit d21a142. The annotated v0.2.1 tag and public GitHub release are published, and GitHub Pages workflow 29181811643 completed successfully. Typecheck, 237 tests, build, npm pack dry-run, and npm publish dry-run all pass. The package contains 72 files and is 316.8 kB packed. Remaining human action: publish @archmap/core@0.2.1 with npm package-owner credentials, then verify npm metadata and jsDelivr endpoints; npm latest remains 0.2.0 until that action completes.
